mechanics.excerpt: Prince Victor has so far made no attempt to regain his lost throne, unwilling to inflict civil war on his people_ Tine fact remains however, that Precentor Martial Steiner Davion has crack military force at his dispos- al, and increasing numbers in the Federated Commonwealth are beginning t0 view him hero for his defeat of the Clans_ Archon Katherine sits uneasily on the throne of New Avalon and may yet be provoked into rash action_ Meanwhile Clans Jade Falcon ad Wolf remain committed to renewing the invasion_ Clan Wolf formally repudiated the results of the Strana Mechty Trial, and Clan Jade Falcon is unlikely to abide by a outcome so offensive t0 its pride Neither Clan has the strength t0 move in force yet, but each is rebuilding at swift pace_ The Capellan Confederation has begun military action against the indepen- dent St.
